note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Application Passwords (HTTP Basic over HTTPS) or cookie+nonce for logged-in sessions; OAuth/JWT via plugins.

expectedFailureResponseShape.message: Sorry, you are not allowed to create posts as this user.

commonIntegrationFailure: 401 rest_cannot_create or rest_forbidden when Application Passwords are disabled, the Authorization header is stripped by the host, or HTTPS is not used.
preventionRule: Use HTTPS + Application Passwords; verify the host forwards the Authorization header; confirm the wp/v2 namespace appears in discovery.
